description: "Workspace instructions for the aricafee repository. Use for bootstrap tasks and project onboarding."

# aricafee workspace instructions

This repository currently contains a minimal codebase with only a top-level `README.md`.

## What this repo contains

- `README.md`: repository title only
- No source code, build scripts, or test files are present yet

## How to use these instructions

- When asked to make changes, first confirm the intended language, framework, and feature scope because the repository currently has no code structure.
- If the task refers to build/test commands or architecture, ask for the preferred tooling and where generated files should live.
- If new files or directories are created, keep them simple and consistent with standard conventions for the chosen stack.

## When to ask for clarification

- If a request mentions API, frontend, backend, database, or tests without existing files or configuration
- If the project should follow a particular framework or package manager
- If the user wants a CI pipeline or code formatting rules

## Notes for future workspace updates

- Once the repo grows, update this file with discovered build/test commands, package manager conventions, and common architecture boundaries.
- Prefer `AGENTS.md` or more targeted `.instructions.md` files later if the project splits into multiple domains.
